# Security Policy

We take the security of the AgenticPMO orchestration layer seriously. If you believe you have found a security vulnerability, please read the guidelines below to report it responsibly.

---

## Supported Versions

Only the latest release tag receives active security patches.

| Version | Supported |
| --- | --- |
| v0.1.x | ✅ Yes |
| < v0.1 | ❌ No |

---

## Reporting a Vulnerability

**Please do not open a public GitHub issue for security vulnerabilities.**

Instead, report vulnerabilities privately by contacting the maintainer, Mohamed Fouad Fakhruldeen, directly through the following channels:
- **GitHub**: [fakhruldeen](https://github.com/fakhruldeen)
- **LinkedIn**: [Mohamed Fouad Fakhruldeen Profile](https://www.linkedin.com/in/fakhruldeen)

### What to include in your report:
- A detailed description of the vulnerability.
- Steps to reproduce (or a proof-of-concept script).
- Potential impact of the issue.

---

## Disclosure Process

1. **Acknowledgment**: We will acknowledge receipt of your report within 48 hours.
2. **Investigation**: We will investigate and develop a fix as soon as possible.
3. **Patch & Release**: Once resolved, we will release a security patch tag and credit you for reporting the issue, if desired.
